channel.title: The Grant Desk - Remote, added in last 30 days
channel.description: Paid open calls, fellowships and residencies in AI, tech, research, and digital and mixed-media arts, sorted into the right pile. Updated as new calls land on the desk. Filtered to: Remote, added in last 30 days.

item.title: O'Shaughnessy Fellowships - Up to $100,000 - deadline 30 Apr 2026
item.description:
OSV Fellowship

Location: Remote

Award: Up to $100,000

Duration: 1 year (remote)

Deadline: 30 Apr 2026

Equity-free fellowship open to adults worldwide. No application fee. Includes access to investors, partners, mentors and optional in-person gatherings for Fellows.

Open call details

Want to see more grants? Visit The Grant Desk (https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/).
